ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar May-31-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg, via Zoom, with and for Rebecca Paul on behalf of the Jewish Family and Children's Services, Petitioner/Conservator.

The court advises that the petitions seem fine and that the court's only issue is with the request to waive future accountings in the trust which the court intends to deny. Ms. Friedeberg does not object to the court's tentative ruling and offers testimony as to the plan moving forward regarding the trust accounting and any future inheritance. The court advises that it intends to add future status hearing dates in the trust and conservatorship matters.

The Accounting Petition is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
